name: Alkermes plc.
business: Alkermes develops and commercializes products for the treatment of schizophrenia, bipolar I disorder, alcohol dependence, opioid dependence, narcolepsy, and multiple sclerosis. The company also licenses its proprietary technologies to third parties for the development and commercialization of products. Alkermes manufactures and markets its proprietary products in the U.S. and receives royalties from licensed products.
sellsTo: physicians in private practice and in public treatment systems

exposures.sentence: We have developed and now commercialize products designed to help address the unmet needs of people living with opioid dependence, alcohol dependence, schizophrenia and bipolar I disorder.

LUMRYZ (sodium oxybate) is an extended-release oral suspension product approved by the FDA in May 2023 as the first and only once-at-bedtime treatment for cataplexy or excessive daytime sleepiness (EDS) in adults with narcolepsy.

VUMERITY (diroximel fumarate) is a novel, oral fumarate with a distinct chemical structure that is approved in the U.S., the EU and several other countries for the treatment of relapsing forms of multiple sclerosis in adults.

catalysts.event: Initiate phase 3 program for alixorexton in narcolepsy
catalysts.sentence: We plan to initiate a phase 3 program in narcolepsy in the first quarter of 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Schizophrenia affects approximately 1.1% of the U.S. population.
tamClaims.sentence: Schizophrenia affects approximately 1.1% of the U.S. population.

tamClaims.claim: An estimated 100,000 people in the U.S. are diagnosed with narcolepsy.
tamClaims.sentence: An estimated 100,000 people in the U.S. are diagnosed with narcolepsy.

tamClaims.claim: An estimated 4.6 million people aged 18 or older in the U.S. had an opioid use disorder in the prior year (2024).
tamClaims.sentence: According to the 2024 U.S. National Survey on Drug Use and Health, an estimated 4.6 million people aged 18 or older in the U.S. had an opioid use disorder* in the prior year.

tamClaims.claim: An estimated 27.1 million people aged 18 or older in the U.S. had an alcohol use disorder in the prior year (2024).
tamClaims.sentence: According to the 2024 U.S. National Survey on Drug Use and Health, an estimated 27.1 million people aged 18 or older in the U.S. had an alcohol use disorder* in the prior year.

tamClaims.claim: Bipolar I disorder affects approximately 1% of the adult population in the U.S. in any given year.
tamClaims.sentence: Bipolar I disorder is characterized by the occurrence of at least one manic episode, with or without the occurrence of a major depressive episode, and affects approximately 1% of the adult population in the U.S. in any given year.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 2.5 million people worldwide have MS.
tamClaims.sentence: Approximately 2.5 million people worldwide have MS, and most are diagnosed between the ages of 15 and 50.
